examples: What happens if a cuttlefish meets its enemy?
Here's a look at how they responded, from the great apes to the cuttlefish.
For toothpaste I used washed-up cuttlefish bone with wild fennel seeds, an oddity for a vegan.
Chicken was cooked with dill, cuttlefish with their ink and wine, octopus with chickpeas.
The first was a very rare 12ft (3.6m) Sowerby's beaked whale - normally a deep water species which feeds off squid and cuttlefish.
